name: Emqx Enterprise
tagline: Open-source MQTT broker for IoT, IIoT, and connected vehicles.
description:
Open-source MQTT broker for IoT, IIoT, and connected vehicles.

Docs: https://www.emqx.io/docs/en/latest/deploy/install-docker.html?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  emqx:
    image: emqx/emqx-enterprise:6.2.0
    environment:
      - EMQX_DASHBOARD__DEFAULT_PASSWORD=9c6b9879c4298799e3fabcf6329fbd28
    volumes:
      - emqx_data:/opt/emqx/data
      - emqx_log:/opt/emqx/log
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - /opt/emqx/bin/emqx
        - ctl
        - status
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 30s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 30s
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42030:18083
volumes:
  emqx_data: null
  emqx_log: null
